# PNET Public Announcement Templates

Status date: 2026-06-27

These templates are designed to keep public communication restrained, source-linked, and verification-first.

## Dossier Update Announcement

```markdown
PNET documentation update

We updated the public PNET asset dossier with a revised whitepaper, verification handbook, documentation index, and contribution-protocol disclosure materials.

The dossier is designed to help reviewers inspect asset facts, tokenomics claims, public sources, market snapshots, and open verification gaps.

This is a documentation update. It is not an investment claim, exchange-listing claim, bridge claim, or return claim.

Repository:
https://github.com/testedprofit/pnet-asset-dossier
```

## Whitepaper v1.1 Announcement

```markdown
PNET Whitepaper v1.1 is ready for public review.

The revised paper defines PNET as a public market-intelligence coordination asset for Algorand. It clarifies asset identity, token mechanics, the contribution-credit roadmap, verification standards, risk boundaries, and open claims requiring independent review.

The paper avoids price, listing, passive-income, and guaranteed-value claims. Open items remain marked Needs verification.

Whitepaper:
https://github.com/testedprofit/pnet-asset-dossier/blob/main/WHITEPAPER.md
```

## TestNet Contribution Protocol Announcement

```markdown
PNET Community Contribution Protocol update

We are preparing a TestNet prototype for app-local contribution credits.

The protocol is designed to support access and reputation features for approved ecosystem participation while keeping user PNET non-custodial.

Contribution credits are not PNET tokens, not deposits, not yield, not passive income, not profit share, not guaranteed value, and not investment returns.

Before anything is described as live, we will publish the source, ABI, deployment transaction, application ID, action-code registry, receipt policy, known limitations, and review status.

Current status: TestNet starter only. Not MainNet. Not audited. Not live.
```

## Verification Report Announcement

```markdown
PNET verification report published

We published a dated verification report covering:

- source links,
- method,
- observed values,
- status labels,
- unresolved claims,
- follow-up items.

Market data should be treated as a dated snapshot only. Any claim without public evidence remains Needs verification.

Report:
[insert link]
```

## Security Review Announcement

```markdown
PNET security documentation update

We updated the public security guide and verification handbook.

The current rules remain:

- no secrets in the dossier,
- no wallet screenshots,
- no signer logic,
- no custody or deposit flows,
- no trading automation,
- no yield, passive-income, or guaranteed-value claims.

Future contracts must publish source, ABI, app ID, deployment transaction, admin policy, test results, and audit status before being described as live.

Security guide:
https://github.com/testedprofit/pnet-asset-dossier/blob/main/docs/security/SECURITY_GUIDE.md
```

## Correction Announcement

```markdown
PNET documentation correction

We corrected a prior claim in the public dossier.

Affected claim:
[insert claim]

Correction:
[insert corrected wording]

Reason:
[insert source-linked reason]

Status:
[Verified / Snapshot only / Needs verification / Needs methodology review]

The changelog has been updated. The project will preserve the correction record rather than silently removing the issue.
```

## Required Footer For Protocol Announcements

```markdown
App-local access/reputation credits only. No deposits, yield, passive income, guaranteed value, investment return, or exchange-listing claim.
```

Current Gate Status: ANNOUNCEMENT TEMPLATES READY FOR REVIEW.
